name: IP Geolocation API
description: ipapi.is IP geolocation and threat intelligence API. Provides IP address geolocation, ASN lookup, VPN/proxy/Tor detection, hosting detection, abuse scoring, and company information. Supports single and bulk lookups with multiple output formats.
